prompt: Create a cinematic photorealistic night scene beside a quiet lake at blue hour, with a narrow curving roadside on the left, a lit streetlamp, dark trees, utility poles and wires, a low guardrail along the water, distant mountains silhouetted across the lake, and small town lights reflecting on the shoreline. A bright full moon hangs above the water and casts a long golden reflection across the dark blue lake. Center the composition on one enormous crisp white Japanese kanji character 月, rendered like a clean high-contrast typography overlay with thick elegant strokes; place it in front of the landscape so the real full moon appears framed inside the upper opening of the character. Use deep blue twilight night, a moody realistic travel-photography style, cool navy tones, subtle film grain, natural streetlight glow, sharp typography, and a wide 16:9 landscape composition.
